title: Reflection Math Inflation: Team Fee Tokens Minted From Thin Air Due to Missing `rteam` Subtraction in `_getRValues`
claim: The `_getRValues` function computes `rTransferAmount = rAmount - rFee` but fails to subtract the team fee's r-equivalent `rteam`. Meanwhile `_taketeam` creates `rteam = tteam * currentRate` tokens from nothing and credits them to the contract's `_rOwned`. Every transfer with a non-zero `_teamFee` inflates the total r-supply by `tteam * currentRate`, diluting all holders. The inflated tokens accumulate in the contract and are periodically swapped for ETH via `swapTokensForEth`, draining the Uniswap V2 pool's ETH reserves to the team wallets at the expense of all token holders.
impact: On-chain evidence shows the bug is actively exploited: the pool pair (0xb835752Feb00c278484c464b697e03b03C53E11B) holds ~1.119e25 TINU while totalSupply() returns only 1.734e21—a 6,450x discrepancy proving massive inflation. Tax fee is 2%, team fee is 6% (verified via storage slots 0x13/0x14), and ownership is renounced (slot 0x0 = 0x0), making this permanently unfixable. Every transfer dilutes holders and drains the pool. The pool's WETH reserve is only ~0.0038 ETH, showing the pool has been almost fully drained by the automatic swap mechanism converting inflated tokens to ETH for the team wallets.

paths.trigger: Any non-excluded account performs a transfer (including self-transfer) while _teamFee > 0
paths.exploit: The sender loses `rAmount = tAmount * currentRate` from `_rOwned`. The recipient receives `rTransferAmount = rAmount - rFee` (missing rteam subtraction). `_taketeam(tteam)` adds `rteam = tteam * currentRate` to `_rOwned[contract]` from thin air without deducting it from anyone. `_reflectFee(rFee, tFee)` reduces `_rTotal` by only `rFee`. Net effect: sum(_rOwned) increases by `rteam - rFee` while _rTotal decreases by only `rFee`; the `rteam` amount is pure inflation. When contract balance exceeds `_numOfTokensToExchangeForteam` (5e15 = 5,000,000 tokens), `swapTokensForEth` automatically swaps the inflated tokens for ETH and `sendETHToteam` transfers ETH to the team/marketing wallets.
paths.optimal_self_transfer: A single self-transfer of 83,333,333 tokens (8.33e16 raw units) generates 5,000,000 team-fee tokens for the contract (reaching swap threshold). Attacker loses only 1,666,667 tokens (2% tax fee) while contract gains 5,000,000 tokens (6% team fee) — a 3:1 inflation ratio.

paths.trigger: Flash-loan amplified attack (as demonstrated by FlawVerifier)
paths.exploit: 1. Flash-borrow WETH from USDC/WETH Uniswap V2 pair (0xB4e16d0168e52d35CaCD2c6185b44281Ec28C9Dc). 2. Buy TINU via `swapExactETHForTokensSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens`. 3. Self-transfer repeatedly: each self-transfer costs the attacker 2% (tax fee) but inflates contract balance by 6% (team fee), net 4% supply inflation per transfer. 4. When contract balance crosses swap threshold, the next non-pair transfer triggers `swapTokensForEth`, selling inflated tokens for ETH (which goes to team wallets). 5. Attacker sells remaining tokens to repay flash loan. While the direct profit from this path is marginal due to round-trip fees (16%), the real value extraction flows to the immutable team wallets (0x9980A74fCBb1936Bc79Ddecbd4148f7511598521 and 0xEBA4a1e0ff3baF18A9D2910874Ffaee11911Cc31).

title: Self-Transfer Allowed Without Sender≠Recipient Check Amplifies Inflation Exploit
claim: The `_transfer` function does not check `sender != recipient`, allowing an attacker to self-transfer tokens. On a self-transfer, the sender loses only `rFee` (tax fee) in r-space while the contract gains `rteam` (team fee) from thin air via `_taketeam`. This enables a single address to amplify the inflation bug without needing a second account or counterparty. The attacker can self-transfer up to `_maxTxAmount` per transaction and repeat to rapidly inflate the contract balance.
impact: Self-transfers enable a single actor to repeatedly trigger the inflation without external counterparties. With current parameters (taxFee=2%, teamFee=6%), each self-transfer creates 3x more value for the contract than the sender loses. The FlawVerifier contract performs up to 24 self-transfers per flash-loan cycle. Combined with the automatic swap mechanism, this allows rapid pool drainage.

paths.trigger: Call `transfer(address(this), amount)` or `_transfer(sender, sender, amount)` where sender == recipient
paths.exploit: 1. Acquire TINU tokens (purchase or flash-loan). 2. Call `token.transfer(address(this), amount)`. 3. In `_transferStandard`: sender's `_rOwned` decreases by `rAmount` and increases by `rTransferAmount = rAmount - rFee`, net loss = `rFee` (2%). Meanwhile `_taketeam` adds `rteam` (6%) to contract. 4. Repeat until contract balance exceeds swap threshold. 5. Contract automatically swaps inflated tokens for ETH via `swapTokensForEth` → `sendETHToteam`.

title: Ownership Renounced with Active Fee Configuration Makes Inflation Bug Permanent and Unfixable
claim: Ownership has been renounced (on-chain `owner()` = 0x0000...0000 at storage slot 0x0) while `_taxFee` = 2% (slot 0x13) and `_teamFee` = 6% (slot 0x14) remain active. All `onlyOwner` functions—including `_setTaxFee`, `_setteamFee`, `setSwapEnabled`, `setExcludeFromFee`—are permanently inaccessible. The team wallet addresses and fee parameters are frozen in their current state. The inflation bug (F-001) can never be mitigated, and swap-enabled automatic ETH extraction to the team wallets continues indefinitely.
impact: The token is permanently broken. Every transfer will continue to inflate supply and drain the pool. No governance mechanism exists to halt or fix this. The Uniswap pool's WETH reserves have already been drained from significant levels to ~0.0038 ETH, and will continue to decrease. Token holders are subject to perpetual dilution with no recourse. The immutable team wallets (0x9980A74fCBb1936Bc79Ddecbd4148f7511598521, 0xEBA4a1e0ff3baF18A9D2910874Ffaee11911Cc31) are the permanent beneficiaries of all future ETH extracted from the pool.

paths.trigger: Ownership was renounced by calling `renounceOwnership()` after setting _taxFee=2, _teamFee=6
paths.exploit: With owner = address(0), no one can call `_setTaxFee`, `_setteamFee`, `setSwapEnabled`, or `setExcludeFromFee`. The inflation bug (F-001) and self-transfer amplification (F-002) will operate indefinitely. The automatic `swapTokensForEth` → `sendETHToteam` cycle will continue extracting ETH from the Uniswap pool on every transfer that pushes the contract balance over `_numOfTokensToExchangeForteam` (5,000,000 tokens).
